categories.name: Frontend Code Quality

issues.title: 398+ console.log/warn/debug statements in production
issues.detail: Codebase contains 398+ unguarded console.log/warn/debug calls across all services (TeamViewService, InviteRegistryReaderService, TreeCache, etc.). These leak internal state, PDAs, and shard IDs to browser console.
issues.fix: Remove all console.log from production code or wrap in VITE_DEBUG flag. Add ESLint rule 'no-console': 'warn'.

issues.title: process.env polyfill is empty object
issues.detail: vite.config.ts defines 'process.env': {} — any process.env.X reference returns undefined. The RpcAuditor.ts check at line 165 (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') NEVER matches, breaking dev-mode gating entirely. Yet all other console.log remain active regardless.
issues.fix: Use import.meta.env.MODE or import.meta.env.DEV instead. Remove process.env polyfill and use Vite-native env vars.

issues.title: Background_old.tsx dead code
issues.detail: File /src/components/Background_old.tsx exists in the tree but is unused. Indicates incomplete cleanup.
issues.fix: Delete Background_old.tsx.

issues.title: Dual WebGLRenderer conflict
issues.detail: main.tsx renders <Background /> outside AppProviders, while Home page likely uses Earth.tsx. Two independent Three.js WebGLRenderer instances compete for GPU, causing FPS drop on mobile.
issues.fix: Consolidate into a single Three.js scene. Disable Background when Earth is visible, or render both in one canvas.

issues.title: Vite dev server config used as-is
issues.detail: vite.config.ts: host: '0.0.0.0', cors.origin: '*', strictPort: true — these are dev-only settings. CORS wildcard exposes the app to any origin.
issues.fix: Use VITE_DEV_MODE flag or separate vite.prod.config.ts. Remove CORS wildcard for production builds.

issues.title: No CSS modules for core components
issues.detail: Header, Footer, WalletButton and other layout components lack CSS modules, relying on global styles.
issues.fix: Adopt CSS modules consistently (*.module.css) for component-scoped styles.

issues.title: No i18n / Russian strings in code
issues.detail: UI strings hardcoded in Russian across components (e.g., 'Кошелек не подключен'). LanguageSwitcher placeholder exists but no i18n framework integrated.
issues.fix: Integrate react-i18next or similar. Extract all strings to translation files (ru/en).

strengths: Clean App.tsx routing with React Router lazy-ready structure
StrictMode enabled in main.tsx for development error detection
Polyfills (Buffer, global) properly configured for Solana compatibility

categories.name: Security

issues.title: Hardcoded Helius API key in source
issues.detail: rpc.config.ts line 34: 'https://devnet.helius-rpc.com/?api-key=demo' — hardcoded demo API key exposed in source code. While marked 'demo', it still exposes the endpoint pattern and could be abused.
issues.fix: Remove hardcoded key. Source RPC URLs exclusively from VITE_SOLANA_RPC_URL env var with no fallback to hardcoded keys.

issues.title: skipPreflight: true on all transactions
issues.detail: Found in 6 locations: StakingDashboard.tsx (lines 347, 523), InvitesDashboard.tsx (line 71), useTransaction.ts (line 27, default), useTeamBonusData.ts (line 56), useConnect.ts (line 460). On mainnet, skipPreflight:true can send invalid transactions that waste fees.
issues.fix: Set skipPreflight: false for mainnet. Keep true only for devnet/testnet. Add cluster-aware logic.

issues.title: console.log leaks PII and internal state
issues.detail: RpcAuditor.ts logs sessionId (line 102), walletPublicKey, traceId, full RPC params/response metadata. TeamViewService logs full PDA addresses, wallet addresses, shard assignments to console.
issues.fix: Remove all production console.log. Implement structured logging to a backend endpoint if needed.

issues.title: IndexedDB audit data persists after logout
issues.detail: RpcAuditor stores sessionId, wallet hashes, full RPC trace in IndexedDB (RpcAuditDB). No cleanup on wallet disconnect. Data persists indefinitely.
issues.fix: Add wallet disconnect listener to clearAllData() from RpcAuditor. Add data retention policy (max 24h).

issues.title: No Content Security Policy (CSP)
issues.detail: No CSP meta tag in index.html and no CSP header. Combined with CORS wildcard, increases XSS risk surface.
issues.fix: Add CSP meta tag or configure in nginx. Use strict CSP: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'.

issues.title: CORS wildcard in Vite config
issues.detail: vite.config.ts: cors.origin: '*' — allows any origin to access the dev server. In shared network environments, this is a risk.
issues.fix: Remove CORS config or restrict to specific origins. This is dev-only config and should not affect production.

issues.title: window.rpcAuditor exposed globally
issues.detail: RpcAuditor.ts line 490: (window as any).rpcAuditor = rpcAuditor — exposes the full auditor instance with exportAll(), clearAllData() in browser console.
issues.fix: Remove global exposure or guard with import.meta.env.DEV.

strengths: IndexedDB-based RPC audit with auto-flush and cleanup is well-architected
No dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage found (no obvious XSS vectors)
Wallet adapter setup correctly uses autoConnect=false

categories.name: Solana Integration

issues.title: skipPreflight:true default on all transactions
issues.detail: useTransaction.ts defaults skipPreflight=true. StakingDashboard, InvitesDashboard, useConnect, useTeamBonusData all use it. On mainnet this bypasses preflight checks, allowing invalid transactions to be submitted.
issues.fix: Add cluster detection: skipPreflight: cluster === 'devnet' || cluster === 'localhost'. Default to false for mainnet.

issues.title: ConnectionContext.Provider override conflict
issues.detail: WalletProvider.tsx line 102: <ConnectionContext.Provider value={{ connection }}> overrides the connection from ConnectionProvider with AuditedConnection. AuditedConnection may not expose all methods of standard Connection class.
issues.fix: Ensure AuditedConnection extends Connection fully and delegates all methods. Consider removing the override and patching ConnectionProvider directly.

issues.title: Token2022 exclusive — Phantom incompatibility
issues.detail: All token operations use TOKEN_2022_PROGRAM_ID only. Phantom wallet on desktop does not display Token2022 balances on devnet/mainnet. Users cannot see their WATER/STABLE balances in wallet.
issues.fix: Add fallback display logic or use standard Token program for balance display. Document Token2022 requirement prominently.

issues.title: RPC fallback chain — single try/catch, no rate limiting
issues.detail: rpc.config.ts defines fallback endpoints but ScaledBatchedRpcFetcher.executeWithFallback iterates them sequentially with no rate limiting awareness. No circuit breaker pattern.
issues.fix: Implement circuit breaker per endpoint. Add rate limit tracking and endpoint exclusion on repeated failures.

strengths: 62 accounts, 32 shards, 20+ PDA seeds comprehensively defined in addresses.ts with typed exports
ScaledBatchedRpcFetcher with adaptive TTL, batch sizing, fallback chain, retry with exponential backoff — high quality RPC layer
AuditedConnection wrapping provides full RPC tracing capability
5 wallet adapters correctly configured (Phantom, Solflare, Ledger, Clover, Alpha)
PDA seed constants and account structure well-organized and documented
Shard-based architecture (32 shards across 7 chunks) correctly implemented

categories.name: Deploy Readiness

issues.title: No Dockerfile in repository
issues.detail: The actual application repository (/tmp/kapelka_tmp) contains NO Dockerfile. The Constructor generated deploy/Dockerfile in waters-core but it was never integrated into the repo.
issues.fix: Copy deploy/Dockerfile to repository root. Use multi-stage build (node:20-alpine → nginx:alpine).

issues.title: No docker-compose.yml in repository
issues.detail: No docker-compose.yml in repo. Cannot orchestrate the service.
issues.fix: Copy deploy/docker-compose.yml to repository root with healthcheck, restart policy, logging limits.

issues.title: No nginx.conf in repository
issues.detail: No nginx configuration in repo. SPA requires proper routing (try_files $uri /index.html), security headers, gzip, caching.
issues.fix: Copy deploy/nginx.conf. Includes SPA fallback, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, rate limiting, gzip, assets caching.

issues.title: No .env or .env.example in repository
issues.detail: No .env or .env.example file in repo. Required env vars (VITE_CLUSTER, VITE_SOLANA_RPC_URL, VITE_APP_VERSION) are undocumented for developers.
issues.fix: Copy deploy/.env.production.example to .env.example in root. Document all required VITE_ variables.

issues.title: No CI/CD pipeline in repository
issues.detail: No .github/workflows directory in repo. No automated audit → build → deploy pipeline.
issues.fix: Copy deploy/.github/workflows/deploy.yml. Configure SSH secrets (REMOTE_HOST, REMOTE_USER, SSH_PRIVATE_KEY) in GitHub.

issues.title: No monitoring or error tracking
issues.detail: No Sentry, Datadog RUM, or any error tracking integrated. Production errors are invisible.
issues.fix: Integrate Sentry or Datadog RUM. Capture unhandled promise rejections and React error boundaries.

issues.title: Vite build lacks production optimizations
issues.detail: No code splitting strategy, no image minimizer plugin, no gzip/brotli compression plugin in vite.config.ts. Bundle size likely >500kb with Three.js + Solana libs.
issues.fix: Add vite-plugin-compression (gzip/brotli), manualChunks for vendor splitting, image optimization plugin.

issues.title: No environment variable validation
issues.detail: WalletProvider.tsx:47 accepts any string for VITE_CLUSTER/VITE_NODE_ENV with no enum validation. Invalid values silently default to devnet.
issues.fix: Add Zod schema or enum validation for VITE_CLUSTER. Throw on invalid values in development.

strengths: Constructor generated complete infra package at deploy/ — Docker, Nginx, CI/CD, .env.example, deploy.sh — but needs integration into repo root
Infra config includes HSTS, rate limiting, gzip, non-root user, HEALTHCHECK, SSL template

critical_issues.title: Hardcoded Helius API key (SEC)
critical_issues.action: Remove from rpc.config.ts immediately. Move RPC URLs to VITE_SOLANA_RPC_URL env var.

critical_issues.title: No Docker/Nginx/CI-CD in repo (DEPLOY)
critical_issues.action: Integrate deploy/* files into repo root: Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf, .env.example, .github/workflows/deploy.yml

critical_issues.title: skipPreflight:true in all transactions (SEC+SOL)
critical_issues.action: Add cluster-aware skipPreflight logic. Set to false for mainnet.

critical_issues.title: 398+ console.log leaking internal state (FRONT+SEC)
critical_issues.action: Mass-remove or gate behind VITE_DEBUG flag. Add ESLint no-console rule.

critical_issues.title: process.env polyfill breaks env detection (FRONT)
critical_issues.action: Replace with import.meta.env.MODE. Remove 'process.env': {} from vite.config.ts.

recommendations_summary: Проект ISamFX/kapelka имеет сильную архитектурную базу (Solana интеграция, шардирование, PDA seeds, ScaledBatchedRpcFetcher), но критически страдает от security-дыр (хардкод ключа, skipPreflight везде, console.log 398+ вызовов) и полного отсутствия deploy-инфраструктуры в репозитории. Конструктор уже сгенерировал Docker, Nginx, CI/CD и .env в deploy/, но эти файлы не интегрированы в корень репозитория. Приоритет: 1) удалить хардкод ключей и console.log, 2) запретить skipPreflight на mainnet, 3) скопировать deploy/* в корень репозитория, 4) настроить CI/CD. Без этих шагов релиз невозможен.
